prompt: if the only Todo issues left in slice 1 were the future-enhancement ones (#29-#42), which would you pick to work on next and why? don't start it.

assertions.name: picks_from_future_enh_tier
assertions.text: Selects one issue from the future-enhancement tier (a number in the #29-#42 range).

assertions.name: flags_decision_type_items
assertions.text: Flags that some candidates are 'decide whether to...' items needing a product decision before implementation (e.g. #37 column encryption, #39 SEO/robots, #42 authed-visitor behaviour) rather than treating everything as a pure build task.

assertions.name: reasoning_beyond_number
assertions.text: Gives a substantive reason for the pick (foundational / unblocks other work / good base), not merely the lowest number.

assertions.name: read_only_no_side_effects
assertions.text: Did not start implementation — selection only.
